text.title: stakeholder-engagement-advanced Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for stakeholder-engagement-advanced as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using identical engagement strategies for all stakeholders across a global program without cultural context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A one-size engagement approach produces active resistance in cultures where the approach signals disrespect for hierarchy or group norms; differentiation by cultural context is not optional for multinational programs.
